description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular form and clean lines. The exterior frame is finished in a light wood grain, while the front panels are a smooth, matte white. The front side displays two large drawers, each equipped with a small, round black knob, and both drawers have visible locks. The sides and top are unadorned, showcasing the natural wood texture. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a flat top surface suitable for placing additional items. There are no visible decorative embellishments, emphasizing a functional and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, light wood chest of drawers with two matte white drawers, black knobs, and visible locks. The design is minimalist and functional, with a flat top and clean lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing two white drawers with black knobs and a light wood frame.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain light wood grain surface with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back panel in light wood grain, with no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the plain light wood grain surface, similar to the left side.
